creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 155334
Fix MASTER_SITES, MAINTAINER

These problems of PORTS/audio/libbs2b can be resolved. 
> 2015-04-06 Mark broken (unfetchable)
> 2015-04-07 Incorrect e-mail address of maintainer

Like as the attached patch mends Makefile, the path to sourceforge file
server and my mail address should be fixed.
   SF/bs2b/bs2b/${PORTVERSION}  --->  SF/bs2b/${PORTNAME}/${PORTVERSION}
   liangtai.s4@gmail.com  --->  liangtai.s16@gmail.com
On other 24 ports I promote, maintainer's account was already updated.

Thank you.
